zh.lifeSummary: Chevalier Olivier I DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer是Chevalier Pierre DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer的兒子，於1150年出生在法國。他至少有1個兒子。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: KAER
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Mahesh.
Indian (Maharashtra): probably a nickname from Marathi kir ‘parrot’.

variants.name: Kear
meanings: English (Gloucestershire): occupational name for a locksmith, from Middle English keyer, kayer ‘key-maker, locksmith’ (Old English cǣgere, a derivative of cǣg ‘key’).

en.lifeSummary: Chevalier Olivier I DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer was born in 1150, in France as the son of Chevalier Pierre DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Chevalier Olivier I DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer est né en 1150, à France, fils de Chevalier Pierre DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Chevalier Olivier I DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer wurde 1150 in Frankreich, als Sohn von Chevalier Pierre DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Chevalier Olivier I DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer è nato il nel 1150 nel Francia come figlio di Chevalier Pierre DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Chevalier Olivier I DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaerは1150年にフランスでChevalier Pierre DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaerの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Chevalier Olivier I DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer(은)는 1150년 프랑스에서 Chevalier Pierre DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Chevalier Olivier I DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer nasceu em 1150, em França filho de Chevalier Pierre DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Chevalier Olivier I DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer родился в 1150 г. в местности Франция. Его отца звали Chevalier Pierre DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Chevalier Olivier I DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer nació en 1150, en Francia como hijo de Chevalier Pierre DE KAER Seigneur de Plessis Kaer. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
